objective: Expose the BetaTool type from the Anthropic SDK beta messages .mjs ambient boundary used by api.ts and toolSchemaCache.ts.
changes: Added a narrow BetaTool interface to the existing @anthropic-ai/sdk/resources/beta/messages/messages.mjs declaration.
Included the BetaTool.InputSchema namespace shape needed by tool schema code without changing runtime imports or call sites.

verification.notes: The src/utils/api.ts and src/utils/toolSchemaCache.ts TS2305 diagnostics for BetaTool no longer appear in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace, attributionTrailer, TerminalCaptureTool prompt, VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants, peerSessions, and workerAgent.
